layman_headline: Crypto market stuck in fear mode — no clean entries worth risking capital on right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with Bitcoin dominance high at 56.5%, which means altcoins are getting crushed relative to Bitcoin. Every swing candidate on the watchlist has a bearish chart structure — prices below their key moving averages with downtrend momentum. While a few coins like TRUMP show deeply oversold RSI readings that historically lead to bounces, the chart patterns and broader market conditions don't support confident entries yet. It's better to wait for clearer setups than to force a trade in this environment.
layman_action: Stay in cash and watch. The market hasn't given a clear green light yet. Wait for fear to peak and reversal signals to actually confirm before putting money in.
expert_reasoning: All nine swing candidates have bearish or strongly bearish chart structures. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — a classic continuation sell pattern, not a buy. TRUMP's RSI of 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the chart bias is -0.7 with poor risk/reward of 1.0x, and it's a meme coin down 97.8% from ATH with no catalyst. LDO has the only bullish chart (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI is already at 59 after a 51.7% 5-day move — chasing extended momentum violates swing discipline. B is up 119% in 7 days and already pulling back hard (-49.9% 5-day momentum). ETH at RSI 39 near $1,800 support offers the most structured setup but needs confirmation. High BTC dominance at 56.5% is an active headwind for all alts. The prudent move is to wait for a confirmed support bounce or RSI dip below 30 with a bullish reversal candle.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to siphon capital from altcoins, making alt entries risky
Fear & Greed at 28 with a flat trend — fear hasn't peaked yet, suggesting more downside possible
No candidates show confirmed bullish reversal patterns — all are still in active downtrends
watch_list: ETH price action at $1,800 support — a bullish hammer or morning star here would trigger a BUY
TRUMP RSI below 22 — if it drops further with a volume spike, could signal capitulation bounce
Fear & Greed index — a move below 20 (Extreme Fear) often marks the best swing entry zone
market_context: Crypto market in Fear territory (28/100) with BTC flat near $64.4K and high dominance at 56.5%. Altcoins are broadly weak with bearish chart structures, and regulatory headlines around stablecoins (GENIUS Act deadline miss, Tether countdown) add uncertainty.
context_banner: Market-wide bearish alt structure with no confirmed reversal signals — disciplined patience is the highest-probability play.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22 is deeply oversold (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but chart structure and risk/reward don't support entry without confirmation.
Fear at 28 with flat trend suggests we haven't reached peak fear yet — historically better entries come at Extreme Fear below 20.
Every candidate except LDO has negative chart bias scores; BONK at -2.0 with Three Black Crows is the worst. No bullish reversal patterns confirmed.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests positioning is getting cleaned out, which could set up a healthier bounce — but needs price confirmation at support.
GENIUS Act deadline missed for stablecoin rules adds regulatory uncertainty that weighs on the broader market and DeFi tokens.
